failure_reason: Canonical artifact docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase5_impact_architecture/impact_architecture.json is absent. The directory phase5_impact_architecture/ does not exist under docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/. Phase 5 (Impact Architecture) has not produced its required output artifact. All 12 deterministic predicates and 1 semantic predicate for phase_05_gate have failed. Per CLAUDE.md §6.2, a phase is not complete until its gate condition is satisfied. Per CLAUDE.md §6.3, phase outputs must be written to Tier 4 before downstream phases may depend on them. Phase 6 (Implementation Architecture) and all downstream phases must not proceed until this gate passes.
tier_authority_applied: CLAUDE.md §6 (phase gate conditions are mandatory; outputs must be written to Tier 4 before downstream phases may depend on them; gaps must be declared), §7 Phase 5 Impact Architecture gate condition (all expected impacts mapped; pathways have project outputs; KPIs traceable; dissemination, exploitation, sustainability plans present), §12.4 (missing mandatory inputs trigger gate failure), §15 (prefer explicit gate failure over fabricated completion)
